languages.text: "Не ожидал встретить благородного человека, ведущего дела с отребьем". {n}Капитан зло сощуривает здоровый глаз.{/n} "Как ты ухитрился вовлечь {mf|его|ее} в свои махинации, Яруб? Что вы оба здесь делаете? Не пытайтесь увиливать. Друг друга вы явно видите не в первый раз".

"I never thought I'd find a {mf|nobleman|noblewoman} having dealings with this scum." {n}The captain narrows his one good eye and glares at Jarub.{/n} "How did you manage to involve {mf|him|her} in your chicanery, Jarub? What are the two of you doing here? Don't play coy with me. This clearly isn't your first meeting."
languages.original_text: "Не ожидал встретить благородного человека, ведущего дела с отребьем". {n}Капитан зло сощуривает здоровый глаз.{/n} "Как ты ухитрился вовлечь {mf|его|ее} в свои махинации, Яруб? Что вы оба здесь делаете? Не пытайтесь увиливать. Друг друга вы явно видите не в первый раз".

What are the two of you doing here? Don't play coy with me. This clearly isn't your first meeting."

"I never thought I'd find a {mf|nobleman|noblewoman} having dealings with this scum." {n}The captain narrows his one good eye and glares at Jarub.{/n} "How did you manage to involve {mf|him|her} in your chicanery, Jarub? What are the two of you doing here? Don't play coy with me. This clearly isn't your first meeting."

"I never thought I'd find a {mf|nobleman|noblewoman} having dealings with this scum." {n}The captain narrows his one good eye and glares at Jarub.{/n} "How did you manage to involve {mf|him|her} in your chicanery, Jarub? What are the two of you doing here? Don't play coy with me. This clearly isn't your first meeting."

languages.text: «Nunca pensé que encontraría a un{mf||a} noble tratando con esta escoria». {n}El capitán entrecierra su ojo bueno y lanza una mirada asesina a Jarub.{/n} «¿Cómo has conseguido involucrarl{mf|e|a} en tus chanchullos, Jarub? ¿Qué hacéis aquí los dos? No intentes escaquearte. Está claro que no es vuestro primer encuentro».
languages.original_text: "I never thought I'd find a {mf|nobleman|noblewoman} having dealings with this scum." {n}The captain narrows his one good eye and glares at Jarub.{/n} "How did you manage to involve {mf|him|her} in your chicanery, Jarub? What are the two of you doing here? Don't play coy with me. This clearly isn't your first meeting."

traits.locale_text: «Nunca pensé que encontraría a un{mf||a} noble tratando con esta escoria». {n}El capitán entrecierra su ojo bueno y lanza una mirada asesina a Jarub.{/n} «¿Cómo has conseguido involucrarl{mf|e|a} en tus chanchullos, Jarub? ¿Qué hacéis aquí los dos? No intentes escaquearte. Está claro que no es vuestro primer encuentro».

languages.text: “我怎么也想不到，堂堂贵族竟会跟这种人渣搅在一起。”{n}上尉眯起仅剩的那只好眼，怒视着雅鲁布。{/n}“你是怎么把这位大人卷进你勾当里的，雅鲁布？你们在这里做什么？别跟我装傻。这显然不是你们第一次见面。”
languages.original_text: "I never thought I'd find a {mf|nobleman|noblewoman} having dealings with this scum." {n}The captain narrows his one good eye and glares at Jarub.{/n} "How did you manage to involve {mf|him|her} in your chicanery, Jarub? What are the two of you doing here? Don't play coy with me. This clearly isn't your first meeting."

traits.locale_text: “我怎么也想不到，堂堂贵族竟会跟这种人渣搅在一起。”{n}上尉眯起仅剩的那只好眼，怒视着雅鲁布。{/n}“你是怎么把这位大人卷进你勾当里的，雅鲁布？你们在这里做什么？别跟我装傻。这显然不是你们第一次见面。”

languages.text: « Je n'aurais jamais cru surprendre un jour {mf|un|une} aristocrate en train de frayer avec une telle crapule. » {n}Le capitaine dévisage Jarub de son œil valide.{/n} « Comment vous êtes-vous débrouillé pour l'impliquer dans vos sales histoires, Jarub ? Qu'est-ce que vous fabriquez ici, tous les deux ? Inutile de jouer les innocents. De toute évidence, vous n'en êtes pas à votre première rencontre. »
languages.original_text: "I never thought I'd find a {mf|nobleman|noblewoman} having dealings with this scum." {n}The captain narrows his one good eye and glares at Jarub.{/n} "How did you manage to involve {mf|him|her} in your chicanery, Jarub? What are the two of you doing here? Don't play coy with me. This clearly isn't your first meeting."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'aurais jamais cru surprendre un jour {mf|un|une} aristocrate en train de frayer avec une telle crapule. » {n}Le capitaine dévisage Jarub de son œil valide.{/n} « Comment vous êtes-vous débrouillé pour l'impliquer dans vos sales histoires, Jarub ? Qu'est-ce que vous fabriquez ici, tous les deux ? Inutile de jouer les innocents. De toute évidence, vous n'en êtes pas à votre première rencontre. »

languages.text: "Bir soyluyu bu pislikle iş çevirirken bulacağım hiç aklıma gelmezdi." {n}Yüzbaşı, sağlam olan tek gözünü kısıp Jarub'a dik dik bakıyor.{/n} "Onu dalaverelerine dâhil etmeyi nasıl başardın Jarub? İkiniz burada ne yapıyorsunuz? Bana masum numarası yapma. Belli ki bu ilk görüşmeniz değil."
languages.original_text: "I never thought I'd find a {mf|nobleman|noblewoman} having dealings with this scum." {n}The captain narrows his one good eye and glares at Jarub.{/n} "How did you manage to involve {mf|him|her} in your chicanery, Jarub? What are the two of you doing here? Don't play coy with me. This clearly isn't your first meeting."

traits.locale_text: "Bir soyluyu bu pislikle iş çevirirken bulacağım hiç aklıma gelmezdi." {n}Yüzbaşı, sağlam olan tek gözünü kısıp Jarub'a dik dik bakıyor.{/n} "Onu dalaverelerine dâhil etmeyi nasıl başardın Jarub? İkiniz burada ne yapıyorsunuz? Bana masum numarası yapma. Belli ki bu ilk görüşmeniz değil."

languages.text: "Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass ich {mf|einen Adeligen|eine Adelige} finden würde, die mit diesem Abschaum Geschäfte macht." {n}Der Captain kneift sein unversehrtes Auge zusammen und wirft einen Blick auf Jarub.{/n} "Wie ist es Euch gelungen, {mf|ihn|sie} auf Eure Seite zu ziehen, Jarub? Was treibt Ihr beiden hier? Und verkauft mich nicht für blöd. Das ist eindeutig nicht Euer erstes Treffen."
languages.original_text: "I never thought I'd find a {mf|nobleman|noblewoman} having dealings with this scum." {n}The captain narrows his one good eye and glares at Jarub.{/n} "How did you manage to involve {mf|him|her} in your chicanery, Jarub? What are the two of you doing here? Don't play coy with me. This clearly isn't your first meeting."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass ich {mf|einen Adeligen|eine Adelige} finden würde, die mit diesem Abschaum Geschäfte macht." {n}Der Captain kneift sein unversehrtes Auge zusammen und wirft einen Blick auf Jarub.{/n} "Wie ist es Euch gelungen, {mf|ihn|sie} auf Eure Seite zu ziehen, Jarub? Was treibt Ihr beiden hier? Und verkauft mich nicht für blöd. Das ist eindeutig nicht Euer erstes Treffen."

languages.text: 「まさか、この卑劣な奴と取引している貴族がいるなんて思ってもみなかったわ。」{n}船長は片方の良い目を細めてジャラブを見据える。{/n}「どうやったら、貴方を巻き込んだの？二人は一体何をしているの？おどけちゃダメよ。明らかに初対面じゃないわ。」
languages.original_text: "I never thought I'd find a {mf|nobleman|noblewoman} having dealings with this scum." {n}The captain narrows his one good eye and glares at Jarub.{/n} "How did you manage to involve {mf|him|her} in your chicanery, Jarub? What are the two of you doing here? Don't play coy with me. This clearly isn't your first meeting."

traits.locale_text: 「まさか、この卑劣な奴と取引している貴族がいるなんて思ってもみなかったわ。」{n}船長は片方の良い目を細めてジャラブを見据える。{/n}「どうやったら、貴方を巻き込んだの？二人は一体何をしているの？おどけちゃダメよ。明らかに初対面じゃないわ。」
